bead.title: bead: claim-lease takeover must require positive owner-PID death (same-machine), not heartbeat age alone
bead.description:
PROBLEM: A peer worker reclaims a bead whose claim lease is merely AGED, even when the owning process is still alive — a primary cause of parallel execution (see ddx-d740539d, two attempts overlapping 16.6 min).

ROOT CAUSE: claimLeaseIsStale (cli/internal/bead/store.go:1014-1025) and ClaimHeartbeatFresh (cli/internal/bead/claim_liveness.go:138-150) decide reclaimability by AGE ALONE (time.Since(rec.UpdatedAt) <= HeartbeatTTL), even though ClaimLeaseRecord records PID and Machine (claim_liveness.go:23, written at store.go:928/:977). Takeover never consults them. By contrast the tracker DIR-lock correctly uses positive death: breakStaleLockDir -> processAlive(pid) (cli/internal/bead/lock.go:88-98). The claim lease has the PID but ignores it, so an aged-but-alive same-machine owner is treated as dead and reclaimed.

PROPOSED FIX: In claimLeaseIsStale, when the lease is older than HeartbeatTTL BUT lease.Machine == this host AND processAlive(rec.PID) is true, treat it as NOT stale (owner alive — refuse takeover) up to a hard fallback ceiling (>= the max lock-hold cap). When Machine differs (PID unknowable cross-machine) or PID is dead, fall back to the existing age-based staleness. Reuse the existing processAlive primitive (lock.go); keep the legacy heartbeatIsStale fallback for rows with no sidecar.

NON-SCOPE: the intake heartbeat gap (sibling bead C1 — they are defense-in-depth; both close the window); land-lock holds.
bead.acceptance:
1. New TestClaimLeaseIsStale_AliveOwnerSameMachineNotStaleDespiteAge (store_test.go or claim_liveness_test.go): lease UpdatedAt older than TTL, Machine=this host, PID=os.Getpid() (alive); assert claimLeaseIsStale/Claim/ClaimWithOptions REFUSE takeover.
2. New TestClaimLeaseIsStale_DeadOwnerPIDReclaimable: Machine=this host, PID=a dead PID, UpdatedAt past TTL; assert takeover permitted.
3. New TestClaimLeaseIsStale_ForeignMachineFallsBackToAge: different Machine; assert age-based staleness still governs (unchanged cross-machine).
4. Existing claim/ready tests in store_test.go and port_gaps_test.go still pass.
5. cd cli && go test ./internal/bead/... -run 'TestClaimLeaseIsStale|TestClaim|TestReady' -count=1 green.
6. lefthook run pre-commit passes.
